markets.desc: Rest Of First Half Total Goals (current score 0:0)
markets.marketGuide: Predict whether the total number of goals scored for the rest of the 1st Half is over/under a given line. Half line (0.5; 1.5; 2.5 etc.) can be settled as won or lost. Whole line (1; 2; 3 etc.) can be settled as won, lost or void. For further information please refer to the “How to Play” section.
markets.name: Rest Of 1st Half Over/Under

markets.desc: Rest of First Half Asian Handicap (current score 0:0)
markets.marketGuide: Predict the winner for the rest of the 1st Half taking into consideration the handicap in brackets.
markets.name: Rest of 1st Half Asian Handicap

markets.desc: Half-time Home Team To Score Yes/No
markets.marketGuide: Predict whether Home Team will score a goal in 1st Half.
markets.name: HT Home Team To Score Yes/No

markets.desc: Half-time Away Team to Score Yes/No
markets.marketGuide: Predict whether Away Team will score a goal in 1st Half.
markets.name: HT Away Team to Score Yes/No

markets.desc: 1st Half Home Team to Win to Nil
markets.marketGuide: Will Home Team win the 1st Half without conceding a goal in 1st Half.
markets.name: HT Home to Win to Nil Yes/No

markets.desc: 1st Half Away Team to Win to Nil
markets.marketGuide: Will Away Team win the 1st Half without conceding a goal in 1st Half.
markets.name: HT Away to Win to Nil Yes/No

markets.desc: Half-time Home Team Total Goals Odd or Even
markets.marketGuide: Predict whether the total number of goals scored by Home Team in 1st Half will be odd or even. No goal counts as even
markets.name: HT Home Total Odd/Even

markets.desc: Half-time Away Team Total Goals Odd or Even
markets.marketGuide: Predict whether the total number of goals scored by Away Team in 1st Half will be odd or even. No goal counts as even
markets.name: HT Away Total Odd/Even

markets.desc: 2nd Half Home Team to Score Yes/No
markets.marketGuide: Predict whether Home Team will score a goal in 2nd Half.
markets.name: 2nd Half Home to Score Yes/No

markets.desc: 2nd Half Away Team to Score Yes/No
markets.marketGuide: Predict whether Away Team will score a goal in 2nd Half.
markets.name: 2nd Half Away to Score Yes/No

markets.desc: 2nd Half Home Team to Win to Nil
markets.marketGuide: Will Home Team win the 2nd Half without conceding a goal in 2nd Half.
markets.name: 2nd Half Home to Win to Nil Y/N

markets.desc: 2nd Half Away Team to Win to Nil
markets.marketGuide: Will Away Team win the 2nd Half without conceding a goal in 2nd Half.
markets.name: 2nd Half Away to Win to Nil Y/N

markets.desc: 2nd Half Home Team Total Goals Odd or Even
markets.marketGuide: Predict whether the total number of goals scored by Home Team in 2nd Half will be odd or even. No goal counts as even
markets.name: 2nd Half Home Total Odd/Even

markets.desc: 2nd Half Away Team Total Goals Odd or Even
markets.marketGuide: Predict whether the total number of goals scored by Away Team in 2nd Half will be odd or even. No goal counts as even
markets.name: 2nd Half Away Total Odd/Even

markets.desc: Home Team To Score Yes/No
markets.marketGuide: Predict whether Home Team will score a goal in Regular Time.
markets.name: Home Team To Score Yes/No

markets.desc: Away Team To Score Yes/No
markets.marketGuide: Predict whether Away Team will score a goal in Regular Time.
markets.name: Away Team To Score Yes/No

markets.desc: Both Teams to Score in Both Halves Yes/No
markets.marketGuide: Predict whether both teams will score in both halves
markets.name: GG in Both Halves Yes/No

markets.desc: No Draw Both Teams To Score Yes/No
markets.marketGuide: Predict whether both teams will score and one of the teams will win the match.
markets.name: No Draw Both Teams To Score Y/N
